shortDescription: Modern 1-bedroom suite in North York Centre with premium finishes and full building amenities.
fullDescription: Welcome to 20 Sheppard Avenue East, Unit 610 in the vibrant North York Centre neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. All 1 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
